creator: zlei@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to punkt.de Hosting Team from comment #2)
> I can reproduce that on 14.2 running on aarch64 (RPi CM3+).

> Any way to move this forward?


I have WIP patch but it runs into LOR ( lock order reversal ). The patch requires some refactoring of if_vxlan(4) but I'm currently focusing on ifnet detaching bugs and have no bandwidth.
